allow:
Bash(# Check Anvil block number and Treasury balance
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8545 -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"eth_blockNumber","id":1}' | python -m json.tool 2>/dev/null

curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8545 -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"eth_getBalance","params":["0x5FbDB2315678afecb367f032d93F642f64180aa3","latest"],"id":2}' | python -m json.tool 2>/dev/null)

Bash(# Check Hardhat account #1 balance on Anvil
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8545 -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"eth_getBalance","params":["0x70997970C51812dc3A010C7d01b50e0d17dc79C8","latest"],"id":3}' | python -m json.tool 2>/dev/null)

Bash(# Verify Hardhat#1 (0x70997970C51812dc3A010C7d01b50e0d17dc79C8) is funded on Anvil.
# Use Hardhat test account; do not commit private keys. See documentation/implementation_plan.md.
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8545 -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"eth_getBalance","params":["0x70997970C51812dc3A010C7d01b50e0d17dc79C8","latest"],"id":1}' \\
  | python -m json.tool 2>/dev/null)

Bash(# Verify full chain state - Treasury balance after payout
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8545 -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"eth_getBalance","params":["0x5FbDB2315678afecb367f032d93F642f64180aa3","latest"],"id":1}' | python -m json.tool 2>/dev/null

# And Hardhat#1 balance to confirm payout received
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8545 -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"eth_getBalance","params":["0x70997970C51812dc3A010C7d01b50e0d17dc79C8","latest"],"id":2}' | python -m json.tool 2>/dev/null)
